narrative:
Marysville 16 (precinct in Union County) has 1,130 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
